name: SCC_CreateSessionStopReq_ISO
title: SCC_CreateSessionStopReq_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreateSessionStopReq_ISO ( byte SessionID[], char ChargingSession[] )
description: Creates a Session Stop Request message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
